title: 5 traits of the man who walks humbly
caption:
God lifts the man who kneels.

Not the man who performs. Not the one who needs the room to know it was him.

The one who walks humbly. Here are 5 traits that define him — and none of them look the way the world would sell you.

He doesn't need the last word. He asks more than he tells. He takes the hard seat first — the apology, the service, the thing nobody wants. He can hear he's wrong without folding. And he gives God the credit and actually means it.

That's not weakness. That's the version of strength most men never find.

"What does the Lord require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God." — Micah 6:8.

That's the whole job.

—

Comment "humble" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
